summary: Comprehensive testing of Headlock Headquarter wrestling school website completed. Backend APIs 100% passing (25/25 tests). Frontend fully functional including booking form, contact form, admin login, and all admin CRUD operations.

issues: Section not visible when no Instagram posts exist in database - expected conditional behavior per code design

passed_tests: Homepage loads with Hero, About, Trainers, Schedule, Gallery, Reviews, Contact sections
Language switch (DE/EN) works correctly on homepage
Navigation links scroll to correct sections
Admin login at /admin with credentials admin/headlock2024
Admin dashboard loads with all tabs: Dashboard, Homepage, Pages, Trainers, Schedule, Gallery, Instagram, Bookings, Contacts, Settings
Trainer management: View trainers list, Add trainer form opens with all fields
Gallery management: View gallery with existing images, Add image form available
CMS Pages management: Table view ready for new pages, 'Neue Seite' button available
CMS Homepage sections: All 8 sections visible (Hero, About, Trainers, Schedule, Contact, Gallery, Instagram, Reviews) with edit/reorder/delete controls
Booking form at /booking: All fields fill correctly (first name, last name, email, phone, date picker, experience level, notes)
Booking form submission works - shows 'Anfrage erfolgreich gesendet!'
Contact form on homepage: Fields fill correctly and submission succeeds with 'Nachricht erfolgreich gesendet!'
All 25 backend API tests passed: Public endpoints, Admin auth, Bookings, Contacts, Trainer CRUD, Gallery CRUD, CMS Pages CRUD, Seed data
seed_data_creation: Seed data endpoint tested - returns 'already_seeded' when data exists. Initial trainers, schedule, and gallery images are seeded.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features are working. The booking form issues reported in iteration_1 have been resolved - the form now works correctly with all fields including date picker and experience level select. The Instagram section only displays when Instagram posts exist in database (conditional rendering by design). All admin CRUD operations are functional. Backend uses HTTP Basic Auth, not JWT tokens.
